name: Blasting Impact
descriptionTemplate: After commanding an armored unit to annihilate an enemy troop, deal an additional X% damage to enemies around the target.

progression.renderedDesc: After commanding an armored unit to annihilate an enemy troop, deal an additional 5% damage to enemies around the target.
progression.renderedDescFr: Après avoir ordonné à une unité blindée d'anéantir un ennemi troop, deal an additional 5% dégâts aux ennemis around the cible.
